✦ Poem ✦

The Candle and the Dark

10 March 2024

I lit a candle in the dark, a small and trembling thing, that threw its shadow on the wall and made the silence sing.

The flame bent low to every breath, yet stubbornly held fast, as if it knew that all great lights must struggle ere they last.

So too the soul, in darkened rooms, will flicker, dip, and sway — but those who shield their candle well shall see another day.

✦ ❦ ✦
